title: onosma mollis
intro: Onosma mollis, also known as the Yellow Toadflax, is a flowering plant species native to China. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Onosma mollis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antitumor activity. Onosma mollis is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a tincture, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
